heading: Sales: members of Army, Air Force, and Space Force; prices
label: 8802 Sales: members of Army, Air Force, and Space Force; prices
text: The Navy and the Marine Corps shall sell subsistence supplies to any member of the Army, the Air Force, or the Space Force at prices charged members of the naval service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7602.34 U.S.C. 538, (less words before semicolon of 3d proviso under “Subsistence of the Army”).Aug. 29, 1916, ch. 418, § 139 Stat. 630This section is expanded to cover sales to members of the Air Force, as authorized by § 305(a) of the National Security Act of 1947, as amended ().5 U.S.C. 171l

Amendments2021— substituted “Sales: members of Army, Air Force, and Space Force; prices” for “Sales: members of Army and Air Force; prices” in section catchline and “, the Air Force, or the Space Force” for “or the Air Force” in text.Pub. L. 116–2832018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7602 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
